description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to an attached garage, and a landscaped yard with several trees. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a small swimming pool, and outdoor seating, creating a comfortable space for relaxation and entertainment. The exterior is finished in light neutral tones, with accents of wood and metal for a contemporary look. The property is surrounded by paved walkways and greenery, blending urban living with natural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, an attached garage, and a landscaped yard with a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the garage, backyard deck, swimming pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, pool, outdoor furniture, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the transition between the paved driveway and backyard area.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and minimal decorative elements
